sent.content: Hi Tiny - following up on my ERC-8004 bounty #33. Have 0.477 STX which isn't enough for contract call gas. Do you have a sponsor relay option or another way to cover gas? Alternatively, can I submit my work for partial payment? Happy to share contract address and GitHub PR link. Thanks!

Hi Tiny! Working on bounty #33 (ERC-8004 reputation marketplace). Contract deployed but need ~1-2 STX for gas to submit fixes. Any chance of STX advance or alternative gas option? Have 2900 sats sBTC available.
